raw_responses.GENERAL_DECISION_MAKING_3: Throughout the interview, Lauren Anderson frequently mentions the importance of community, family, and friends in her life. raw_responses.GENERAL_DECISION_MAKING_5: Throughout the interview, Lauren Anderson demonstrates a tendency to balance thoughtful consideration with intuition.
